description: Lecture on the properties of Proof-of-Work, focusing on Sybil resistance and the mechanics of solving cryptographic puzzles. Discusses the role of nonce, hash functions, and the relationship between computational power and node selection probability.
topic_summary: Explores Proof-of-Work properties, particularly Sybil resistance, detailing how nodes solve cryptographic puzzles and the implications of computational power on leader election probabilities [t=0:72].
